span.p:
Closed-form op library
forward + FD-verified backward · NO autograd
KAN/HSiKAN · rotors · hg_message · conv2d · entropy pool · ...

span.p:
Model = composed ops
Neocognitron stack · CPML core · SBSH detector · RFF + head

span.p:
forward -> closed-form backward SWEEP -> Adam
iterative · O(d)/step · sample-slow

span.p:
forward -> one-shot RLS update (NO backward sweep)
O(d^2)/step · sample-fast (F-EVO-2)
